output.summary: Consolidate preset filter pills into the active-filters bar and remove the separate .archive-preset-filters container. When displayFilters=true, preset terms render as non-interactive <span> pills (no X, no hover) inside .archive-active-filters alongside interactive user-selected pills. When displayFilters=false, no pills are shown at all — presets still apply to the query silently.

fileChanges.description: Remove .archive-preset-filters container; render preset pills as <span> elements inside .archive-active-filters
fileChanges.details:
1. DELETE the entire .archive-preset-filters block (lines 350-366): the `<?php if ( ! empty( $preset_filters ) && $has_selected_option ) : ?>` conditional and its contents.
2. MODIFY the .archive-active-filters loop (lines 321-345): Remove the skip-preset logic (lines 331-333 that check `if preset_filters contains term then continue`). Instead, inside the loop over selected_options, check whether each term is a preset term. If it IS a preset term, render a non-interactive `<span>` pill (same styling as existing preset pills: `inline-flex items-center border border-current rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-body-small uppercase font-medium tracking-wider` but NO data-field, NO data-value, NO .archive-remove-filter, and add class `archive-preset-pill`). If it is NOT a preset term, render the existing interactive `<button>` pill with X icon as before.
3. The .archive-active-filters container condition already requires `$show_filters && $displayFilters` — this ensures when displayFilters=false, no pills render at all (presets still apply to the query via hidden inputs and $selected_options).

fileChanges.description: Remove .archive-preset-filters references; add preset <span> pills in buildButtons()
fileChanges.details:
1. DELETE the `presetFiltersSelector` variable declaration (line 6) and the AJAX update block for preset filters (lines 133-137 that update oldPresetFilters innerHTML).
2. MODIFY the `buildButtons()` function (lines 287-328): After building interactive buttons for user-selected values, also render preset values as non-interactive `<span>` pills inside the active-filters container. For each taxonomy field, iterate `presetFilters[field]` and for each preset term, insert a `<span class="archive-preset-pill inline-flex items-center border border-current rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-body-small uppercase font-medium tracking-wider">` with the term label (looked up from the select option text). These spans have no data-field/data-value, no X icon, and no click handler.
3. The existing CSS rule `.archive-active-filters:has(button:only-child)` hides the bar when only Clear All is present. UPDATE this to also account for spans: change to `.archive-active-filters:not(:has(button[data-field], .archive-preset-pill))` or similar so that preset-only pills still show the bar but a bar with only the Clear All button (and no pills of any kind) stays hidden.

fileChanges.description: Move preset pill styles from .archive-preset-filters scope to .archive-active-filters scope; update hide rule
fileChanges.details:
1. DELETE the `.archive .archive-preset-filters .archive-preset-pill` and its hover rule (lines 231-241).
2. ADD equivalent styles scoped to `.archive .archive-active-filters .archive-preset-pill`: cursor: default, no transition, no background, no hover effect. This ensures preset pills inside the active-filters bar remain visually non-interactive.
3. MODIFY the `.archive-active-filters:has(button:only-child)` hide rule (line 32-34): Change to `.archive-active-filters:not(:has(button[data-field], .archive-preset-pill))` so the container hides when there are no interactive pills AND no preset pills (i.e., only the Clear All button remains).

designDecisions.decision: Preset pills render inside .archive-active-filters as <span> elements, mixed with interactive <button> pills
designDecisions.evidence: User specified: render preset terms as non-interactive <span> pills inside the existing .archive-active-filters bar

designDecisions.decision: When displayFilters=false, no pills of any kind are shown — presets apply silently to the query
designDecisions.evidence: User specified: when displayFilters=false show NO pills at all, presets still apply to the query silently

designDecisions.decision: Preset pills are not removable — no X button, no click handler, no hover effect
designDecisions.evidence: User specified: non-interactive <span> pills with no X, no hover

designDecisions.decision: The .archive-preset-filters container is removed entirely from PHP and JS
The active-filters hide rule updated to account for preset <span> pills so the bar shows when only preset pills exist
designDecisions.evidence: Current CSS hides .archive-active-filters:has(button:only-child) which would incorrectly hide the bar when only preset spans + Clear All button are present
